sources.title: Gold (1974)
sources.description: Rod Slater is the newly appointed general manager of the Sonderditch gold mine, but he stumbles across an ingenious plot to flood the mine, by drilling into an underground lake, so the unscrupulous owners can make a killing in the international gold market. Watch on RetroFlix:  https://retroflix.org/gold-1974/

sources.title: 1974 - Gold - Roger Moore - Can one man stop a billion-dollar disaster?
sources.description:
Golden greed turns deadly! A flooded mine, a corporate conspiracy, and one man's race to save thousands trapped underground.
New mine manager Rod Slater uncovers a plot by financiers to flood his South African gold mine and manipulate global prices. When disaster strikes, Slater and miner Big King battle rising waters to detonate a safety charge that could save lives—or bury them forever.

Original Title: Gold (1974) | AKA: The Great Gold Conspiracy

⭐️ STARRING
Roger Moore - Rod Slater
Susannah York - Terry Steyner
Ray Milland - Hurry Hirschfeld
Bradford Dillman - Manfred Steyner
John Gielgud - Farrell
Simon Sabela - Big King

🎬 CREW
Directed by Peter R. Hunt (On Her Majesty’s Secret Service)
Written by Wilbur Smith & Stanley Price
Pulsating score by Elmer Bernstein (The Magnificent Seven)

🎯 WHY WATCH?
⚡️ High-Stakes Conspiracy • 💰 Corporate Greed • 🌍 Claustrophobic Thrills
Roger Moore swaps Bond’s tux for a hard hat in this gritty 70s adventure!

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics

Thriller • Adventure • 1970s • Cult Classics • Disaster Film • Crime Drama
